solver_native_model: Sparrow CDE multisheet (own native Rust port); finite-stock pool with Q40/Q41 unified margin/spacing geometry; continuous rotation policy

solver_cli_args.output_desc: Path where the solver writes the SolverOutput JSON

own_solver_source_diff_pre: empty (0 bytes) — verified by 'git diff -- rust/vrs_solver/src api worker frontend vrs_nesting'
strip_vs_finite_stock: Q43b is a 1x1500x6000 single finite stock run; the Q43 upstream is an SPP 1500x6000 strip; the Q42 own is a 3x1500x3000 finite-stock multisheet. All three use the same 12 part type / 276 instance geometry.
comparability: Direct geometry parity (same parts); direct container-area parity (Q43/Q43b both 9.0 m^2 strip); inventory model differs (SPP vs finite stock); objective differs (min-width vs placement-density). Documented as PARTIAL_DIRECTLY_COMPARABLE between Q43b and Q43 upstream.
